stemHtml: Under normal conditions, in a dual FMS architecture: (NB: FMC = Flight Management Computer)

options.a: the master FMC is ON, the other is OFF and ready to start in case a failure of the master FMC.
options.b: one FMC is used by the captain, the other by the first officer. The FMC`s are not synchronised.
options.c: one FMC is working as the master and the other as a slave.
options.d: only one FMC feeds the two FMS`s.
